name: com.yunxee.cocoflow
description: A modular Unity game development framework with Context-driven State Layers, Character/Enemy gameplay foundations, optional samples, and Editor tooling.

samples.description: Fusion-oriented network compatibility plan based on input bridges, context snapshots, and event envelopes.
Sample chest wiring that demonstrates Persistence Context and Container paths.
Sample enemy states, intent/config assets, and a prefab wired to CharacterContextProvider, EnemyBrain, EnemySpline, and one Main State Layer.
Sample player states and a prefab wired to CharacterContextProvider, CharacterLocomotion, and explicit Main/FullBody/UpperLayer State Layers.
